arts.sum: Barça will look to reaffirm their league lead at the Gran Canaria stadium this Saturday against Las Palmas. This week sees Hansi Flick's team face UD Las Palmas in the Estadio Gran Canaria as they attempt to defend their lead over their closest rivals Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid in the race for the league title.

arts.ttl: Liverpool player’s entourage admit contact with another club – Reds renewal offer key
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Luis Díaz was linked to Barcelona over the past few windows and still continues to get linked to them. Earlier this week, El Chiringuito journalist Jose Alvarez Haya said the forward has offered himself to the La Liga club. arts.ttl: Manchester City to face Barcelona competition for summer target – Citizens still interested after testing waters in January
arts.sum: Manchester City were keen on signing Juventus’ Andrea Cambiaso in the winter transfer window. The move didn’t go through as Pep Guardiola’s side looked to sign other targets but there has been confidence that Cambiaso can still end up at the Etihad in the summer. arts.ttl: Champions League draw LIVE: Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa learn last-16 opponents and route to the final
arts.sum: The three Premier League sides will learn who they face in the round of 16, as well as their potential opponents in the quarter-finals and semi-finals

arts.ttl: Chelsea to rival Barcelona in chase for world-class winger
arts.sum: Chelsea have gone off the boil somewhat this season, but still want to be in the conversation when Barcelona try to land Rafael Leao from AC Milan. It would appear that a clear out of Rossoneri first-team players is on the cards with Gazzetta dello Sport (subscription required) suggesting that Fikayo Tomori, Ruben Loftus-Cheek, Malick […] The post Chelsea to rival Barcelona in chase for world-class winger appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ronald Araujo to Man Utd: Rating the rumour
arts.sum: Incredibly, it is stated that United are willing to offer up to €100m for the Uruguay international in a deal that would be the second largest in the history of the Red Devils, surpassed only by the €105m it took to re-sign Paul Pogba from Juventus in 2016. Araujo may only recently have signed a new contract with Barcelona that stretches to 2031, but because of the ongoing financial difficulties at the Catalan side, a deal could be possible.

arts.ttl: Barcelona have growing interest in transfer deal that could benefit Manchester United
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly have a growing interest in the potential transfer of Marseille forward and former Manchester United youngster Mason Greenwood. The Catalan giants have supposedly been impressed by Greenwood’s performances in Ligue 1 this season as he looks to rebuild his career after a difficult end to his time at Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Barca’s top selling shirt names revealed as Yamal tops list
arts.sum: However, the next name on the list belongs to Lionel Messi. Barcelona’s top selling shirts have been revealed and there’s a bit of a surprise when it comes to the three most popular jerseys.

arts.ttl: Barca trio Pedri, Yamal and Flick nominated for February La Liga awards
arts.sum: Barcelona stars Lamine Yamal and Pedri as well as coach Hansi Flick are all up for La Liga’s February awards. Flick is up for manager of the month after overseeing wins over Rayo Vallecano, Sevilla and Alaves in La Liga to return Barcelona to the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star rejected an €8 million January exit
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was the subject of a January proposal on the part of Italian outfit Como. That’s according to Marca, who…
